name: crm-envigado-piloto
description: Piloto EspoCRM + formulario de reportes ambientales

scripts.stop: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:Path = 'C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\Docker\cli-plugins;' + $env:Path; docker compose down"
scripts.logs: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:Path = 'C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\Docker\cli-plugins;' + $env:Path; docker compose logs -f"
